goal: Apply operator-selected short readable comparison table as canonical operator decision format.

implementation_scope.requirement: Operator decision Telegram must be generated only from structured decision packages.
Render BEM header, stage, roadmap, checklist, question, readable comparison table, details, recommendation, reply instruction.
Never notify Telegram for routine Claude↔GPT mailbox messages.
Operator choices must persist as machine-readable JSON.
Decision must route to curator, role orchestrator, and internal contour without manual relay.

acceptance_criteria: Canonical protocol exists and states short readable comparison table.
Operator decision JSON exists for bem584_decision_format_live_test.
Curator intake exists for same decision.
Role orchestrator intake exists for same decision.
Internal contour task exists for same decision.
Evidence report and proof files exist.

risks.risk: Telegram reply intake may still be flaky due HTTP 403 or webhook state.
risks.mitigation: Keep chat fallback only for explicit operator choice; continue hardening poller/webhook separately.

risks.risk: Box-drawing table can still wrap on very narrow screens.
risks.mitigation: Keep cells short and move long text to details block.
